---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that does not work as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

The exact command line (redact any API key) and, if possible, a minimal fixture:

```bash
rpgm-ai-translator ...
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Environment

- rpgm-ai-translator version: <!-- e.g. 0.1.8 (run `rpgm-ai-translator --help`) -->
- Node version: <!-- `node --version` -->
- OS:
- Provider / model (if relevant): <!-- e.g. deepseek / deepseek-v4-flash, or a custom --base-url -->

## Additional context

Logs or report output (redact API keys and any proprietary game text). Do **not**
attach real commercial game files.
